specs.title: cp-000: PencilSimple icon button
cp-001: Navigates to studioproject_id
cp-002: Navigation happens without page reload client-side routing
cp-003: Archive icon button with amber styling
cp-004: Sets project status to archived via archiveProjectid
cp-005: Project status badge updates to Archived immediately optimistic
cp-006: Archived projects remain visible filterable via status filter
cp-007: Revalidates relevant paths
cp-008: Trash icon button with red styling
cp-009: Triggers soft-delete via deleteProjectid sets deleted_at
cp-010: Project removed from list immediately optimistic
cp-011: Deleted projects do not reappear on page refresh
cp-012: No confirmation dialog mentioned verify if one should exist
cp-013: UI does not flash or flicker during optimistic updates
cp-014: If an API call fails after an optimistic update the UI state is corrected
cp-015: FolderOpen icon displayed large centered
cp-016: Title No projects yet
cp-017: Description Create your first research project to start organizing papers writin
cp-018: Create Your First Project button displayed
cp-019: Button opens the New Project Modal
cp-020: Empty state only shows when total project count is 0
cp-021: FunnelSimple icon displayed
cp-022: Title No matching projects
cp-023: Description Try adjusting your search or filters
cp-024: Displays when active filterssearch yield zero results but projects exist
cp-025: Clearing filters restores the project list
cp-026: Route-level loader renders a skeleton header plus SkeletonTable with 6 rows
cp-027: Route-level loader wraps content in max-w-5xl mx-auto
cp-028: Route-level loader is distinct from the page components client fetch spinner
cp-029: While loading is true in the page component a centered SpinnerGap renders inside
cp-030: No flash of the empty state occurs before the client fetch finishes
cp-031: A caught getProjects failure logs Failed to load projects and then falls through
cp-032: Route-level errortsx is not used for caught client-side fetch failures
cp-033: Route-level error UI title is Projects unavailable
cp-034: Route-level error UI message is We couldnt load your projects Please try again
